description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/alelec/docker-android with two stages: build and outputs. In the build stage add a build job that runs ./gradlew assemble, copies the generated APKs from ./app/build/outputs/apk/*/*.apk to the project root, lists the APK files, and stores all .apk files as artifacts. In the outputs stage add a debug job that renames any *debug*.apk to Navdy-MapDownloader-debug.apk and publishes that file as an artifact. Also add a release job that renames any *release*.apk to Navdy-MapDownloader.apk and publishes it as an artifact.
